SerPri2: Reduce the impacts of Phytophtora dieback on forest values through the implementation of effective Phytophthora dieback management, monitoring and reporting for all planned disturbance operations (external proponents & Parks and Wildlife Service).

Implement activities to manage public firewood collection including enforcement action against the illegal selling of firewood,and complete work to standardise the arrangements for provision of public firewood in the south-west forests.
